author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: Continue maintainer loop by resolving docs drift where PRD item example linked test command is sandbox-unsafe despite hard policy; add contract test to keep docs aligned.
Fix PRD linked-test example to sandbox-safe command and add release-readiness contract guard against unsafe linked-test examples.

PRD linked test example uses sandbox-safe node scripts/run-tests.mjs command and release-readiness contract test fails on unsafe example strings; pm test and pm test-all sweeps pass with 100 percent coverage.
Docs drift identified and release-readiness contract test target selected.
Keep docs and contracts aligned with sandbox-safe linked-test policy
Reduces risk of unsandboxed pm test entries from docs
Authoritative docs and contract tests enforce sandbox-safe linked test examples
PRD currently includes unsafe linked test example contradicting hard requirements
